detection.title: How RealText analyzes text
paragraphs: RealText uses algorithmic stylistic analysis — not a black-box AI model. It measures specific, interpretable characteristics of your writing:
Burstiness: Human writing naturally alternates between long and short sentences. AI tends to produce uniform sentence lengths. RealText measures this variance.
Lexical Diversity (TTR): The ratio of unique words to total words. AI text often reuses the same vocabulary, while humans draw from a richer word pool.
Repetition Patterns: AI frequently repeats structural patterns. RealText detects these n-gram repetitions across your text.
AI-Typical Connectors: Phrases like "It is important to note that" or "Moreover" appear at unusually high rates in AI text. RealText counts these per language.

items.a: Yes. 5 free analyses per day without creating an account. No trial, no hidden costs, no credit card.

items.q: What AI models can RealText detect?
items.a: RealText detects stylistic patterns common to ChatGPT, GPT-5, Gemini, Claude, LLaMA, and Mistral. It analyzes writing style, not model-specific signatures.
Most reliable for unedited AI text. Less reliable for heavily edited content. We're transparent: the real value is in actionable suggestions, not just the score.

items.q: Is my text stored or shared?
items.a: No. Your text is analyzed in memory and immediately discarded. We never save, log, or share submitted content.
20+ languages. The interface follows your browser language, and suggestions are provided in the language of the text you submit.

items.q: Can I use RealText to "beat" AI detectors?
items.a: RealText helps improve writing quality by addressing robotic patterns. Better writing is the goal, not gaming detectors.

footer.tagline: Free AI text detector and humanizer.

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.body: RealText ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use our website and AI text analysis service at realtext.org.

sections.heading: Text Analysis Data
sections.body: We do not store your text. When you submit text for analysis, it is processed in server memory and immediately discarded after the analysis is complete. We never save, log, or share the content you submit for analysis.

sections.heading: Data We Collect
sections.body:
We collect minimal data necessary to operate the service:

  • Anonymous usage counters: We track the number of analyses performed per IP address per day to enforce the daily free limit. No text content is stored.
  • Server logs: Standard web server logs may contain IP addresses, browser type, and request timestamps. These are used solely for security and debugging purposes and are automatically rotated.

sections.heading: What We Do NOT Collect
sections.body:
• We do not require account creation or registration
  • We do not collect email addresses, names, or personal identifiers
  • We do not use cookies for tracking or advertising
  • We do not share any data with third parties for marketing purposes
  • We do not store or log the text you submit for analysis

sections.heading: Third-Party Services
sections.body: Our text analysis may use third-party AI APIs (such as OpenAI or Anthropic) to generate humanization suggestions. When this occurs, your text is sent to these services for processing only. These services have their own privacy policies and data handling practices. We do not control how they process data beyond the scope of our API requests.

sections.heading: Data Security
sections.body: We use industry-standard security measures to protect our infrastructure, including encrypted connections (HTTPS), firewalled servers, and minimal data retention.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.body: Since we do not collect personal data or store user content, there is minimal data to access, modify, or delete. If you have questions about your data, contact us at the email below.

sections.heading: Changes to This Policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date.

sections.heading: Acceptance
sections.body: By using RealText (realtext.org), you agree to the following terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

sections.heading: Service Description
sections.body: RealText provides a free AI text detection and humanization tool. The service analyzes text for stylistic patterns commonly associated with AI-generated content and provides suggestions for improvement.

sections.heading: Free Usage
sections.body: RealText offers up to 5 free text analyses per day per user, without registration. We reserve the right to modify usage limits at any time.

sections.heading: Acceptable Use
sections.body:
You agree to use RealText only for lawful purposes. You may not:

  • Attempt to bypass usage limits through automated means
  • Use the service to process illegal, harmful, or abusive content
  • Reverse-engineer, scrape, or programmatically access the service without authorization
  • Interfere with the service's operation or other users' access

sections.heading: No Guarantees
sections.body: RealText provides text analysis as an informational tool. We do not guarantee the accuracy of AI detection results. Our analysis should not be used as the sole basis for academic, professional, or legal decisions. False positives and false negatives can occur.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.body: You retain full ownership of any text you submit for analysis. We claim no rights over your content. The RealText name, design, and blog content are our intellectual property.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.body: RealText is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of our service, including but not limited to inaccurate detection results, service interruptions, or data loss.

sections.heading: Changes to Terms
sections.body: We may update these Terms of Service at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For questions about these terms, contact us at: info@realtext.org
